Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC8F5 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Pilgrim.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cb00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pilgrim.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $CB00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note: the bitmap data at $E000, screen RAM data at $CC00 and the colour RAM data have all been modified in order to incorporate the CRL logo into the image. In the original, this was made with sprites.
